title: Add report deletion and remove login requirement

requirements.text: Add a deleteProductionEntry backend function that allows any caller (no authorization check) to delete a production entry by its ID.

quotes: i want to delete the reports that are generated after submitting the entry

acceptanceCriteria: A deleteProductionEntry(id) function exists in the backend actor
The function removes the entry with the given ID from stable storage
No authentication or ownership check is performed — any caller can delete any entry
The function returns an ok/error variant indicating success or failure

requirements.text: Add a useDeleteProductionEntry React Query mutation hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts that calls the backend deleteProductionEntry function and invalidates the production entries query on success.
acceptanceCriteria: useDeleteProductionEntry mutation hook is exported from useQueries.ts
On success, the production entries query cache is invalidated
A success toast is shown on deletion
An error toast is shown if deletion fails

requirements.text: Add a Delete button for each report row in the ReportsViewer component (frontend/src/components/admin/ReportsViewer.tsx). Clicking it should call the delete mutation with a confirmation prompt before deletion.
acceptanceCriteria: Each row in the reports list has a visible Delete button
Clicking Delete shows a confirmation dialog or prompt before proceeding
Confirming deletion calls useDeleteProductionEntry with the entry ID
The deleted report is removed from the list after successful deletion

requirements.text: Add a Delete button on the individual report detail view (if one exists, or inside the report's expanded/modal view in ReportsViewer). Clicking it should call the delete mutation with a confirmation prompt and navigate back to the reports list after deletion.
acceptanceCriteria: A Delete button is visible in the individual report detail view or expanded row
Clicking Delete shows a confirmation dialog before proceeding
After successful deletion, the user is returned to or the detail view is closed

requirements.text: Remove the login requirement from the app. The app should be directly accessible without authentication. Remove the login button from the Header component, remove authentication guards in App.tsx, and make all pages (DataEntryPage and AdminDashboard) accessible without being logged in.
acceptanceCriteria: No login button is displayed in the Header
No authentication guard redirects or blocks access to DataEntryPage or AdminDashboard
Both tabs are visible and accessible without any login
ProfileSetupDialog is not shown on app load
The app loads directly to the main interface without any login prompt

constraints: Do not require authentication for delete operations — any user can delete any report
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Role-based access control or admin-only deletion
Any new login or authentication mechanism
